visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair, wearing a light grey oversized short-sleeved t-shirt, sits cross-legged on a white bed. The background features a beige wall with a delicate white floral wallpaper pattern. In front of him are three varieties of Nissin Cup Noodles. He holds a white plastic utensil, gesturing excitedly with his right hand toward the camera while maintaining direct eye contact and a wide, enthusiastic smile. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up shot on a wooden side table. A cup of noodles is shown with its lid partially peeled back. The man uses the curved handle of the white plastic utensil to securely pin down the lid of the cup against the rim. He points at the mechanism with his index finger while a star-shaped graphic appears on the screen. (3) The man holds the white utensil closer to the camera to demonstrate its dual spoon-and-fork design. The camera then cuts to a close-up of the cup's interior, showing the man successfully scooping up corn, meat chunks, and small toppings using the shallow spoon-like curvature of the device's head. (4) The scene shifts to show the man lifting a large clump of wavy noodles from the cup. The fork part of the utensil features distinct wavy prongs that provide grip. He displays a look of shock and amazement as the noodles remain perfectly balanced on the utensil without sliding back into the soup. (5) A side view demonstration shows the utensil being scraped against the curved inner bottom corner of the noodle cup. The specific radius of the tool's head perfectly matches the cup's geometry, allowing him to easily collect the final crumbs of ingredients and small broken noodle bits that are usually difficult to reach. (6) The video returns to a medium shot of the man sitting on the bed. He holds the utensil up like a trophy and raises the cup of noodles, speaking with high energy and nodding his head. He maintains a joyful and persuasive expression throughout the conclusion of his demonstration.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 天才發明. [Subtitle]: 找到這個好東西阿. [Logo]: @yga0721. (2) [Slogan]: 日清杯麵專用匙. (3) [Subtitle]: 用途一. [Variety]: 完美卡住. (4) [Subtitle]: 用途二. [Variety]: 方便吃料. (5) [Subtitle]: 用途三. [Variety]: 避免麵滑. [Variety]: 超穩. (6) [Variety]: AMAZING. (7) [Subtitle]: 用途四. [Variety]: 貼合杯碗. [Variety]: 完美撈起. (8) [Slogan]: 推薦各位去試試.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man with short brown hair, wearing a plain light grey oversized t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bedroom setting with a bed covered in white sheets and a wall with beige floral wallpaper. A wooden side table and a landline phone are visible in some shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, high-arousal male voice speaks rapidly in Traditional Chinese, exhibiting a very energetic and friendly tone. The background music is a bright, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady 4/4 beat and synthesizer textures. Ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a quiet indoor recording environment with professional-grade vocal clarity and high signal-to-noise ratio. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the speaker shifts his pitch slightly higher to introduce the first feature. The music continues at a consistent volume. The speaker's delivery is punchy and emphasizes specific syllables to mirror the fast-paced visual editing style. (3) A digital 'pop' sound effect occurs, punctuating the demonstration of the spoon function. The speaker's voice is projected loudly, maintaining a sense of excitement and wonder. There is no background noise or interference, keeping the focus entirely on the narration and the rhythmic BGM. (4) An exaggerated 'Amazing!' exclamation in English is delivered with high vocal intensity and a rising intonation. This is followed by a 'sparkle' chime sound effect, which adds a magical or high-quality connotation to the product being showcased. The music's percussive elements remain prominent. (5) Multiple short 'ding' sound effects are used to mark the transition between different points of the demonstration. The speaker's pace remains fast, with very few pauses, creating a high-information density atmosphere typical of social media product reviews. (6) The speaker concludes with a final energetic statement, his voice maintaining its dominant and authoritative presence. A final 'whoosh' sound and a percussive synth hit mark the end of the audio track as the music fades out quickly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature 1 -> Feature 2 -> Feature 3 -> Feature 4 -> Conclusion/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an enthusiastic product demonstration and recommendation for a specialized promotional utensil (a fork-spoon hybrid) from Nissin Cup Noodles. The creator uses a high-energy delivery, fast-paced editing, and clear visual evidence to highlight the tool's practical benefits for eating instant noodles.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator extensively showcases the features of a Nissin promotional product, uses brand logos clearly, and explicitly recommends viewers to try it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media 'influencer' editing styles, including high-contrast text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement during a product pitch.
